name: CTI Witch
role: Cyber Threat Intelligence Team Lead @ FinTech
heroBlurb: Threat Intelligence analyst experienced in leading teams, building and optimizing processes, fraud and digital-risk incident response, Takedown, and running tactical, operational and strategic operations.
about: Threat Intelligence analyst experienced in leading teams, building and optimizing processes, responding to fraud and digital-risk incidents, and taking down corporate or fraudulent online content (Takedown).
I run tactical, operational and strategic CTI operations across the Instituição Financeira group — from OSINT hunting to defining team strategy and maturity.

bullets: Built and optimized CTI processes; defined team strategy and maturity.
Digital-risk and fraud incident response, threat mitigation and Takedown of fraudulent content.
OSINT hunting and monitoring rules across surface, deep and dark web; threat hunting planning (TaHiTI).
Trained analysts and integrated with SOC N1/N2, Anti-fraud and Red Team. Serves FinTech, subsidiária and beneficiária.
Incident response and alert monitoring (SIEM, EDR, Antivirus).
Internal threat hunting and log analysis with KQL (Kusto Query Language).
Built SOC/IR processes, playbooks, reports and trained new analysts.

experience.role: SOC N2 · N3 Forensics · Security Module
bullets: Phishing and fraud analysis, takedown support (N2).
Digital forensics, log correlation, timeline reconstruction and TTP mapping to MITRE ATT&CK (N3).
Worked with the security module (módulo de segurança proprietário) and improved detection rules.

experience.role: Red Team · Cyber & Fraud Prevention Unit
bullets: Penetration-testing support: reconnaissance, vulnerability analysis and technical reporting.
Continuous learning in offensive security techniques.

certs.name: Trellix Protect Plus EDR for Endpoint

contactBlurb: Open to collaborations and chats about CTI, threat hunting and OSINT.
